query: SELECT gameDate, COUNT(*) as count, MIN(publishedToFeed) as minPublished, MAX(publishedToFeed) as maxPublished FROM games GROUP BY gameDate ORDER BY gameDate DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT gameDate, COUNT(*) as count, MIN(publishedToFeed) as minPublished, MAX(publishedToFeed) as maxPublished FROM games GROUP BY gameDate ORDER BY gameDate DESC LIMIT 10;
